parts.text:
```plantuml
@startuml
actor user
entity "Gstreamer Pipeline" as GstreamerPipeline
entity realsensesrc
entity librealsense2
entity GStreamer

user -> GstreamerPipeline : realsensesrc\nserial=728...
note left: load GSt\npipeline with\nrealsensesrc
activate GstreamerPipeline

== pipeline goto GST_STATE_READY ==

GstreamerPipeline -> realsensesrc : create
activate realsensesrc

realsensesrc -> librealsense2 : rs2::context.query_devices()
activate librealsense2
librealsense2 --> realsensesrc : rs2::device_list
deactivate librealsense2

realsensesrc -> librealsense2 : select device by serial
activate librealsense2
librealsense2 --> realsensesrc : rs2::sensor
note right: Select device
deactivate librealsense2

loop for (info: rs2::rs2_camera_info)
    realsensesrc -> librealsense2 : rs2::device.supports(info)
    activate librealsense2
    librealsense2 --> realsensesrc : bool
    deactivate librealsense2

    realsensesrc -> librealsense2 : rs2::device.get_info(info)
    activate librealsense2
    librealsense2 --> realsensesrc : const char* info_string
    deactivate librealsense2

    realsensesrc -> realsensesrc : store info
    activate realsensesrc
    realsensesrc --> realsensesrc
    deactivate realsensesrc
end

realsensesrc -> GStreamer : gst_tag_setter_add_tag_valist_values(...,infos, NULL)
activate GStreamer
GStreamer --> realsensesrc
note right: Register per-stream\nmetadata as\nGst tags
deactivate GStreamer

realsensesrc -> librealsense2 : rs2::sensor.get_stream_profiles()
activate librealsense2
librealsense2 --> realsensesrc : std::vector<rs2::stream_profile>
deactivate librealsense2

loop for (profile: std::vector<rs2::stream_profile>)
    realsensesrc -> realsensesrc : Create profile_list of supported profiles
    activate realsensesrc
    realsensesrc --> realsensesrc
    deactivate realsensesrc
end

realsensesrc -> GStreamer : g_object_class_install_properties(...,...,options)
activate GStreamer
GStreamer --> realsensesrc
note right: Install all\nsupported\nvideo profiles\nas an option
deactivate GStreamer

loop for (option: rs2::rs2_option)
    realsensesrc -> librealsense2 : rs2::sensor.supports(option)
    activate librealsense2
    librealsense2 --> realsensesrc : bool
    deactivate librealsense2

    realsensesrc -> librealsense2 : rs2::sensor.get_option_range
    activate librealsense2
    librealsense2 --> realsensesrc : rs2::option_range
    deactivate librealsense2

    realsensesrc -> realsensesrc : store option
    activate realsensesrc
    realsensesrc --> realsensesrc
    deactivate realsensesrc
end

realsensesrc -> GStreamer : g_object_class_install_properties(...,...,options)
activate GStreamer
GStreamer --> realsensesrc
note right: Install all\nsupported\nRS camera options\nas properties/options
deactivate GStreamer

realsensesrc -> GStreamer : gst_bus_add_watch(bus, bus_call...);
GStreamer --> realsensesrc
note right: Register callback\nfor parameter changes

GstreamerPipeline -> realsensesrc : caps negotiation\n(CAPS)
note right: - pixel_format\n- width\n- height\n- framerate

== pipeline goto GST_STATE_PLAYING ==

GstreamerPipeline --> realsensesrc : state=playing

realsensesrc -> librealsense2 : rs2::sensor.start()
activate librealsense2
librealsense2 --> realsensesrc
deactivate librealsense2

== pipeline goto GST_STATE_READY ==

realsensesrc -> librealsense2 : rs2::sensor.stop()
activate librealsense2
librealsense2 --> realsensesrc
deactivate librealsense2

deactivate realsensesrc
deactivate GstreamerPipeline

@enduml
```
